patch.description: Patch to apply to one or more traces. Distinguishes between "leave alone" (`None`) and "clear" (`Some(NullableField::Clear)`) — the TS side uses literal `null` for clearing; we serialize as a flat `Option<...>` and reserve the `null` literal in the JSON shape via `#[serde(default, deserialize_with = "...")]` if we later need to distinguish. For now `None` covers both — frontends use the absence to mean "leave alone" and explicit `null` to mean "clear", which serde handles transparently.

clusterId.description: New cluster id, or `null` to drop the trace from any cluster.

note.description: Replace the membership note, or `null` to clear it.

split.description: New split, or `null` to mark unassigned.

status.description: Health status of a trace as judged by the dataset owner.
